title: Remove and install paddle shift switches - (shift down)

crossRefs.label: HFT switch removal (vehicles equipped with HFT switch)
Audio remote switch removal (models equipped with audio remote switch)

blocks.text: Remove and install paddle shift switches - (shift down)

items: If there are components of the SRS airbag system in the vicinity, refer to the work precautions and configuration drawings described for the SRS airbag system before proceeding.

blocks.text: 2. HFT switch removal (vehicles equipped with HFT switch)

refs.label: HFT switch removal (vehicles equipped with HFT switch)

blocks.text: Remove the body cover (A). Remove the garnish (B).
4. Audio remote switch removal (models equipped with audio remote switch)

refs.label: Audio remote switch removal (models equipped with audio remote switch)

blocks.text: Disconnect the paddle shift switch- (shift down) coupler from the coupler holder and disconnect the coupler. Remove the paddle shift switch - (shift down) (A).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
